name: Pattaya Monkey Badminton Center
nameThai: พัทยา มังกี้ แบดมินตัน เซ็นเตอร์
addressFull: 252/152 Moo 13, Soi Sukhumvit 81, Nong Prue, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Google Maps currently shows an opening time of 10:00. Full weekly closing hours were not published in the sources reviewed.

booking.method: Phone or Line administrator; booking is strongly recommended
booking.leadTime: An independent coach asks for 1-2 days for coach-handled court booking
booking.hourlyRate: ฿200 per hour, stated as the included court value in an independent coach's current package
booking.notes: The rate is not from a venue-owned tariff. Recent Thai reviews say new customers may struggle to secure a slot when regular groups retain bookings.

equipment.shoeHire: Available according to reviews; fee unpublished

coaching.groupRate: External bilingual coach: ฿3,500 for eight group hours used within two months, court included
coaching.privateRate: External coach: ฿6,500 for ten one-to-one hours used within six months, court included
coaching.notes: This is an independent coach using Monkey and 272 Estadio, not a venue-run academy.

englishEvidence: A coach currently selling group sessions at this venue explicitly describes the sessions as Thai/English. English-language location reviews also document service to foreign visitors; venue reception English was not separately confirmed.

audience.whoShouldSkip: Heat-sensitive players and spontaneous visitors without a confirmed booking may prefer another venue.

praise: Thai and English reviews describe clean, standard courts, convenient parking and a central South/East Pattaya location.
The venue continues to host organised Thai badminton tournaments, including events listed in March and April 2026.
complaints: Three Thai reviews from roughly seven months before verification say the Line administrator prioritised regular groups, gave terse replies and could not offer slots to new customers.
English reviews warn that the unairconditioned hall gets very hot and that borrowed shoes can be poor quality.

comparison.differentiator: An established tournament venue with a directly evidenced bilingual external coaching option.

sources.label: Google Maps location and Thai reviews
Fastwork bilingual coach and court-rate listing

unverified: whether coaching is contracted by the venue or solely external
